steps.title: Treat the title as essential
steps.content: The title The Freeloaders identifies which photograph by Lola Alvarez Bravo the sentence is discussing. Because the title is essential to identifying the work, it should attach directly to photograph with no punctuation.

steps.title: Reject punctuation after photograph
steps.content: Choice A wrongly sets off the title with a comma. Choice C uses a semicolon before a title, not an independent clause. Choice D uses a colon after a noun phrase rather than a complete clause. The answer is B.
